reference: THE SHIFTY MATI ILU EITHER CHERISHED THE HOPE THAT SHARDURIS WOULD RECOVER STRENGTH AND AGAIN INVADE NORTH SYRIA OR THAT HE MIGHT HIMSELF ESTABLISH AN EMPIRE IN THAT REGION
text: The shift he meant he ill you: either cherished the hope that Shaduris would recover strength and again invade North Assyria, or that he might himself establish an empire in that region.
